name: XM1014 | 狂野丛林
descriptionEn: The XM1014 is a powerful fully automatic shotgun that justifies its heftier price tag with the ability to paint a room with lead fast. This memento from Ruins has individual parts spray-painted solid colors in a jungle color scheme. For those with an appetite for destruction
descriptionZh: XM1014 是一把强大的全自动霰弹枪，其高昂的价格赋予了它高射速和室内清剿的能力。 这把来自玛雅遗址的纪念武器的部分零件以丛林的配色方案进行了整体喷漆。 献给毁灭狂人们
